results.title: Rocket Launch Schedule & Countdown
results.content: # Space Coast’s Next Launch Attempt. **Falcon 9 Block 5 | BlueBird Block 2 #3-5 Moved to: 06/17/2026**. **Falcon 9 Block 5 | BlueBird Block 2 #3-5**. **Falcon 9 Block 5 | Project Starfall Demonstration Mission**. **Falcon 9 Block 5 | Globalstar 2-R Mission 1 (x 9)**. With NASA, SpaceX, and United Launch Alliance sending rockets to the stars, your chance of catching a launch on your next Space Coast getaway are highly likely. Download the "Space Coast Launches" app today for the most up to date launch details, live videos, and more information. Download the Space Coast Launches App. Download the app Space Coast Launches app today for live videos, launch details and more information. \*\* This page is automatically updated once a day, for the most up to date launch times check the Space Coast Launches App. Learn More on the App.

content.text:
The last SpaceX launch took place on **June 12, 2026**.

As of today, June 19, 2026, that was **7 days ago**.
